_schema: see schema.md — tier: T1 pre-registered / T2 internal / T3 third-party

candidates.evidence: 2026-07-17 pilot (glm-ocr-anova:{f16,q8_0,q4_K_M}, Ollama, SHA256-pinned GGUFs): q4_K_M ~30% faster than f16 at word_recall ~0.98; 2026-05 phase-1 pilot table in article1 CLAUDE.md
candidates.caveats: MLX serving path retired (mlx-swift-lm#191 quality regression); Ollama path is the reproducible arm

candidates.evidence: ovisocr2 Ollama build smoke-tested 2026-07-18 (two-FROM Modelfile, SHA256-pinned GGUF + mmproj); vendor benchmark claims remain T3 until our sweep
candidates.caveats: no pilot quality/speed numbers on our corpus yet

candidates.evidence: smoke-verified 2026-07-20 on mcs p46 @ dpi100: f16/q8_0/q4_K_M all recall 0.986-1.000 via Ollama + ERNIE chat template + native 'OCR:' prompt; official F16 (f3ae46ec) + mmproj (204d757d); q8_0/q4_K_M DERIVED via llama-quantize brew 9960 (2bda93a4/d79bfabc)
candidates.caveats: REQUIRES native task prompt — generic instruction prompt yields degenerate loops (isolated live: template ok, prompt is the trigger); math as \( \) not $ (Y3 delimiter normalization); no public MLX artifact → E2 conditional clause only; other versions' artifact map in git history

candidates.role: excluded from the factorial by design
candidates.evidence: det+rec CNN/Transformer pipeline, no LLM component
candidates.caveats: not a VLM — has no LLM weights to quantise, so the Quant factor is undefined for it; admissible only as a non-VLM baseline in exploratory/discussion, or a future article
general VLM, not OCR-specialised; larger memory footprint than 0.9B class
document-conversion focus; output format differs from plain-markdown contract
